name: BEND WINSUPPLY CO
address: 1320 SE ARMOUR ROAD BLD D, BEND, OR 97702

fr.recommendations: Enhanced emergency response effectiveness at this property might benefit from optimizing access routes and potential entry points, given the single access point available. Establishing clearly marked paths to and from all structures could facilitate quicker navigation and operational movement for responders. In vehicle parking and loading areas, maintaining clear zones free from obstructions would support unobstructed movement and improved staging of emergency vehicles. Improved visibility in landscaped areas, possibly through strategic trimming and lighting, may aid in navigation and operational oversight. Ensuring multiple access pathways are well defined around the main building and additional structures could enhance responder movement and operational capability during an emergency situation.

wildfire.recommendations: Enhancing defensible space around the property could be achieved by increasing the separation between the structure and adjacent vegetation, managing the scattered trees, and ensuring there is adequate separation between them to reduce fuel continuity. Focus on maintaining a clear space around the immediate perimeter of the structure by trimming or removing vegetation, which would help to lower the potential for fire spread to the building. Managing the vegetation on the perimeter by reducing densities and maintaining open areas could further improve the defensible space while minimizing potential fuel continuity. Regularly maintaining these areas may support ongoing vegetation management and improve the overall resilience of the property against potential wildfire exposure.
